Settings

Merlin separates two kinds of configuration: environment variables (set in .env, managed by a developer or system administrator) and in-application settings (stored in the database, edited through the Settings pages in the UI by authorised users). This page covers the in-application settings system. For environment variables, see Configuration.

How settings are stored

In-application settings use the spatie/laravel-settings package. Each settings group is a typed PHP class where each property corresponds to one setting. The values are persisted to a settings database table and loaded on demand. Livewire form components on the settings pages read from and write to these classes directly.

Settings groups

There are five settings classes across the application modules:

ClassGroup keyModule
CompanySettingscompanyCore
CurrencySettingscurrencyCore
AccountingSettingsaccountingAccounting
PurchasingSettingspurchasingPurchasing
BillingSettingsbillingBilling

Editing settings

Settings are edited through three pages in the Settings section of the navigation:

  • General (/settings/general) — company details, currency and locale, and financial year start month
  • Purchasing (/settings/purchasing) — tax rate and label, default payable account, confidence thresholds, and matching tolerances
  • Billing (/settings/billing) — default accounts, billing period day, default payment term, and invoice email template

Settings reference

Every setting key, its type, default value, and which settings page controls it:

KeyTypeDefaultPage
Company
namestring(empty)General
address_line_1string(empty)General
address_line_2string(empty)General
citystring(empty)General
state_provincestring(empty)General
postal_codestring(empty)General
countrystring(empty)General
phonestring(empty)General
emailstring(empty)General
tax_numberstring(empty)General
logo_pathstring or nullnullGeneral
Currency
base_currencystringZARGeneral
localestringen_ZAGeneral
Accounting
financial_year_start_monthinteger (1–12)NEEDS CONFIRMATION: no default in classGeneral
Purchasing
default_payable_accountstring (account code)2000Purchasing
tax_default_ratefloat (%)15.00Purchasing
tax_labelstringVATPurchasing
autopost_confidencefloat (0–1)0.90Purchasing
fallback_confidencefloat (0–1)0.80Purchasing
amount_tolerancefloat (%)10.0Purchasing
description_similarityfloat (0–100)60.0Purchasing
Billing
billing_period_dayinteger (1–28)1Billing
default_receivable_account_idUUID or nullnullBilling
default_bank_account_idUUID or nullnullBilling
default_payment_term_idUUID or nullnullBilling
tax_liability_account_idUUID or nullnullBilling
invoice_email_template_idUUID or nullnullBilling
